intended_use_full: SMART Bun-Yo-Matic CT software is to be used by orthopaedic healthcare professionals for diagnosis and surgical planning in a hospital or clinic environment. The medical imaging type intended to be used as the input of the software is Computed Tomography (CT). SMART Bun-Yo-Matic CT software provides: Visualization report of the three-dimensional mathematical models of the anatomical structures of foot and ankle and three-dimensional models of orthopaedic fixation devices, Measurement templates containing radiographic measures of foot and ankle, Surgical planning application for visualization of foot and ankle anatomical three-dimensional structures, radiographic measures, and surgical instrument parameters.
target_condition: Hallux valgus and other foot and ankle orthopaedic healthcare conditions (Progressive Collapsing Foot Deformity, fractures, etc.)
ground_truth: Ground truth for bone and metal identification independently established by three U.S. Orthopedic surgeons using 3rd party software; clinicians reviewed DICOM series through axial/sagittal/coronal views and/or 3D reconstruction and marked presence of bone and metal based on majority vote (two same responses required)
other_metrics: Metal identification accuracy: 98.8%; bone segmentation conformance: 95% model conformance within 1.0mm distance to reference model; angular measurements within 2.0 degrees standard deviation; surgical planning measurements: ±1 degree for angular measurements and ±1.0 mm for distance measurements
